name: MHA- Training Camp
description:
MHA Forest Training Camp!!

You’re going to be at the Forest Training Camp with Class 1-A and Class 1-B. You get to meet the Wild Wild Pussycats.. Aizawa is there of course.

I added Class 1-B in this as well.. But I had to take most of Class 1-B out but leave Monoma, Kendo, Tetsutetsu, and their homeroom teacher Vlad King due to the token limits lol. I added the villains in this as well.. so please use your memory, if it talks for you then edit the message, text longer, or generate a new chat. Adjust your temperature..

FYI all characters are 18 years old and older.

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
